title: Aeneid I: Arms and the Man
description: The opening of Rome's national epic: Aeneas, driven by fate, sails from Troy to found the Roman race.
introduction: The opening of Rome's national epic: Aeneas, driven by fate, sails from Troy to found the Roman race.

translation.text: I sing of arms and the man who, exiled by fate, first came from the shores of Troy to Italy.
